subcodes.first_line: O Thou Beloved of my heart and the One remembered in my soul! Long indeed hath been my heedlessness, my stupor and my slumber. In every condition do I acknowledge [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محبوب فوادی و المذکور فی قلبی قد طال غفلتی و سکری و نومی فیکل الاحوال اقر
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @spiritualization of humanity in the future; a new race of men, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @corruption and renewal; abandoning religious dogmas, @present and future calamities; war; universal convulsion, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
